NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-18-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-23-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE, SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF SUFFICIENT NOTICE UNDER CCP 437C; COUNSEL FOR MOVING PARTY IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. MR. MOROZOV INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE FILED FOR BANKRUPTCY. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB).

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MOROZOV, OLEG SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-18-2011
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $894.50 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JAN-12-2011, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
